sentences.translationEn: The book is a faithful friend to humans.

sentences.arabic: فِي الْأَدَبِ الْعَرَبِيِّ، نَجِدُ حِكَمًا كَثِيرَةً عَنِ الْقِرَاءَةِ.
sentences.translation: U arapskoj književnosti nalazimo mnogo mudrosti o čitanju.
sentences.translationEn: In Arabic literature, we find much wisdom about reading.

sentences.arabic: الْكُتُبُ تَنْقُلُنَا إِلَى عَالَمٍ جَدِيدٍ وَمُخْتَلِفٍ.
sentences.translation: Knjige nas prenose u novi i drugačiji svijet.
sentences.translationEn: Books transport us to a new and different world.

sentences.arabic: كُلُّ صَفْحَةٍ تَحْمِلُ فِكْرَةً مُفِيدَةً أَوْ قِصَّةً مُثِيرَةً.
sentences.translation: Svaka stranica nosi korisnu ideju ili uzbudljivu priču.
sentences.translationEn: Every page carries a useful idea or an exciting story.

sentences.arabic: لِذَلِكَ، يَهْتَمُّ الطُّلَّابُ بِبِنَاءِ مَكْتَبَةٍ صَغِيرَةٍ فِي بُيُوتِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Zato se učenici trude da izgrade malu biblioteku u svojim domovima.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, students care about building a small library in their homes.
